TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_balucu‚Äô_a_masatedep, title = balucu‚Äô_a_masatedep, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/balucu‚Äô_a_masatedep} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == balucu' a masatedep, duma a ngangan saicelang nu balucu' a msatedep, kateng a masatedep ku balucu' "te-yu: Herzinsuffizienz / Herzschw√§che, yin-yu: heart failure, saadidiay a suliten: HF", i hekalay a kamu sa mahaymaway a malawpesay a balucu' "chronic heart failure, CHF", mayda u yu-sie-sin a balucu' a malawpes "congestive heart failure"; anu u balucu' caay pakacudu tu tangay a idang pabeli tu sakaydih nu udip, a mutahkal ku a masatedepay nu balucu'. a masatedepay nu balucu' a imelang idaw ku anu muhanhan caykadayum, anu tadamanglu atu mabudus ku kuku'. anu macahiyu ku hanhan micidek i nipiundu, anu mutalienang atu mabiyi sangdep dayum sa, mangle. i nama hiniyay a imelang sawni mipulu' tu nipitiyung nu mudekuay atu dimata nu undu, anu kapakapah ku nipikuwan, sataneng tu ku nipiundu. :Herzinsuffizienz / Herzschw√§che,ŤčĪŤ™ě:heart failure,ÁłģŚĮę:HF), .
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° a masat…ôd…ôp, duma a ŇčaŇčan sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° a msat…ôd…ôp, kat…ôŇč a masat…ôd…ôp ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° "t…ô-ju: ńß…ôrzinsuffizi…ônz / ńß…ôrzs ¶ńßw* ¶ńß…ô, jin-ju: ńß…ôart fair~…ĺur…ô, saadidiaj a sur~…ĺit…ôn: ńßf", i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a kamu sa mańßajmawaj a mar~…ĺawp…ôsaj a bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° " ¶ńßroni ¶ ńß…ôart fair~…ĺur…ô, ¶ńßf", majda u ju-si…ô-sin a bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° a mar~…ĺawp…ôs " ¶oŇč…ôsti*…ô ńß…ôart fair~…ĺur…ô"; anu u bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° ¶aaj paka ¶udu tu taŇčaj a idaŇč pab…ôr~…ĺi tu sakajdińß nu udip, a mutańßkar~…ĺ ku a masat…ôd…ôpaj nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °. a masat…ôd…ôpaj nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč idaw ku anu muńßanńßan ¶ajkadajum, anu tadamaŇčr~…ĺu atu mabudus ku kuku Ē~ °. anu ma ¶ańßiju ku ńßanńßan mi ¶id…ôk i nipiundu, anu mutar~…ĺi…ônaŇč atu mabiji saŇčd…ôp dajum sa, maŇčr~…ĺ…ô. i nama ńßinijaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč sawni mipur~…ĺu Ē~ ° tu nipitijuŇč nu mud…ôkuaj atu dimata nu undu, anu kapakapańß ku nipikuwan, satan…ôŇč tu ku nipiundu. :ńß…ôrzinsuffizi…ônz / ńß…ôrzs ¶ńßw* ¶ńß…ô,**:ńß…ôart fair~…ĺur…ô,**:ńßf), .
S.FORM: == kakiliman == balucu' a masatedep, duma a ngangan saicelang nu balucu' a msatedep, kateng a masatedep ku balucu' "te-yu: Herzinsuffizienz / Herzschw√§che, yin-yu: heart failure, saadidiay a suliten: HF", i hekalay a kamu sa mahaymaway a malawpesay a balucu' "chronic heart failure, CHF", mayda u yu-sie-sin a balucu' a malawpes "congestive heart failure"; anu u balucu' caay pakacudu tu tangay a idang pabeli tu sakaydih nu udip, a mutahkal ku a masatedepay nu balucu'. a masatedepay nu balucu' a imelang idaw ku anu muhanhan caykadayum, anu tadamanglu atu mabudus ku kuku'. anu macahiyu ku hanhan micidek i nipiundu, anu mutalienang atu mabiyi sangdep dayum sa, mangle. i nama hiniyay a imelang sawni mipulu' tu nipitiyung nu mudekuay atu dimata nu undu, anu kapakapah ku nipikuwan, sataneng tu ku nipiundu. :Herzinsuffizienz / Herzschw√§che,ŤčĪŤ™ě:heart failure,ÁłģŚĮę:HF), .
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° a masat…ôd…ôp, duma a ŇčaŇčan sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° a msat…ôd…ôp, kat…ôŇč a masat…ôd…ôp ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° "t…ô-ju: ńß…ôrzinsuffizi…ônz / ńß…ôrzs ¶ńßw* ¶ńß…ô, jin-ju: ńß…ôart fair~…ĺur…ô, saadidiaj a sur~…ĺit…ôn: ńßf", i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a kamu sa mańßajmawaj a mar~…ĺawp…ôsaj a bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° " ¶ńßroni ¶ ńß…ôart fair~…ĺur…ô, ¶ńßf", majda u ju-si…ô-sin a bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° a mar~…ĺawp…ôs " ¶oŇč…ôsti*…ô ńß…ôart fair~…ĺur…ô"; anu u bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° ¶aaj paka ¶udu tu taŇčaj a idaŇč pab…ôr~…ĺi tu sakajdińß nu udip, a mutańßkar~…ĺ ku a masat…ôd…ôpaj nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °. a masat…ôd…ôpaj nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč idaw ku anu muńßanńßan ¶ajkadajum, anu tadamaŇčr~…ĺu atu mabudus ku kuku Ē~ °. anu ma ¶ańßiju ku ńßanńßan mi ¶id…ôk i nipiundu, anu mutar~…ĺi…ônaŇč atu mabiji saŇčd…ôp dajum sa, maŇčr~…ĺ…ô. i nama ńßinijaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč sawni mipur~…ĺu Ē~ ° tu nipitijuŇč nu mud…ôkuaj atu dimata nu undu, anu kapakapańß ku nipikuwan, satan…ôŇč tu ku nipiundu. :ńß…ôrzinsuffizi…ônz / ńß…ôrzs ¶ńßw* ¶ńß…ô,**:ńß…ôart fair~…ĺur…ô,**:ńßf), .
